Prerequisite: CPSN101.

CPSN250 College Park Scholars: International Studies - Research Practicum (1-3 Credits)

Supervised research in an area related to international studies. Prerequisite: CPSN101.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars International Studies (CPSN) program.
